name: Cuatro Mismo
title: Cuatro Mismo Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Cuatro Mismo | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A light, easy-drinking highball of BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum and soda water finished with lime.
marketing_description: As the story goes, tourists in Cuba saw locals drinking BACARDÍ and soda water, so they ordered the same thing. It’s the “I’ll have what she’s having” of the cocktail world.

steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum.
Add the soda water and stir well before serving.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Cuatro Mismo 50 ml BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum 100 ml soda water ... Fill a highball glass with ice. Pour in the BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum. Add the soda water and stir well before serving. Garnish with a lime wedge.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Cuatro Mismo Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
